tabs.name: Dashboard
tabs.description: Cash, burn, runway — formulas read from other tabs. Do not type numbers here.

tabs.name: Metadata
tabs.description: Company name, currency, as-of date, onboarding flag.

tabs.name: foundingCapital
tabs.description: Money put in at incorporation or funding rounds.

tabs.name: expenses
tabs.description: Every receipt and purchase. type = opex or capex.

tabs.name: aiEmployees
tabs.description: AI tools treated as operators with monthly cost.

tabs.name: projects
tabs.description: Deals and delivery work. received feeds cash.

tabs.name: loans
tabs.description: Borrowed money. installment adds to monthly burn.

tabs.name: objectives
tabs.description: OKRs — objective plus keyResults JSON array.

tabs.name: RawData_Backup
tabs.description: Full JSON backup written by Apps Script. Hidden.

burnFormula: monthlyBurn = sum(aiEmployees.cost) + sum(employees.salary) + sum(loans.installment) + sum(expenses where type=opex and date in current month)
